text:
You don't have to navigate this alone. Here are some support options available to you:

💼  EAP (Employee Assistance Programme) — free, confidential, via HR
🏥  IMH Community Mental Health — 6389 2200 (Mon–Fri)
🤝  Singapore Association for Mental Health — 1800-283-7019
📱  Intellect app — daily check-ins and guided exercises
👩‍⚕️  Singapore Nurses Association — sna.org.sg

Tell me a bit about what you're looking for and I'll help point you in the right direction.
